GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Luxury cruise line Cunard proves a ship is the most stylish way to travel", "On board a Cunard ship, dressing for the occasion is half the fun. Classic silhouettes and easy resort separates look just as chic on deck as they do on a shore excursion. There is no form of travel so deeply synonymous with style as that enjoyed aboard a ship. When it comes to ships steeped in style-laden history, British heritage brand Cunard leads the way. Considering a world voyage? Here's how to curate your own cruise collection with outfits and accessories worthy of your luxurious surroundings. Keep it cool poolside in fashion-forward separates that can easily translate from the deck to the dock. A statement bathing suit and a straw hat are musts. Gala evening takes place on board every Cunard voyage, so be sure to pack a black tie look for a formal evening of five star dining and fun-filled dancing. Cunard's ships journey around the globe, docking at some of the most incredible locations in the world. For this reason, remember to pack several stylish looks for day trips, with a monochrome T-shirt and trousers moment a staple and shirting a fail-safe addition. Every evening on board a Cunard ship calls for smart attire, so be sure to pack a number of cocktail looks that can do double duty for your wardrobe. If you forget a look? Pop into one of Cunard's on-board boutiques and select a new look courtesy of Max Mara, Kate Spade or Mulberry."
